title: feat: allowlist LynxUnbanned for community models
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds GitHub user ID `123343834` for `LynxUnbanned` to the community model allowlist.
- Keeps the change scoped to the shared allowlist.

gist.headline: Welcome to the hive, LynxUnbanned!
gist.blurb: We've added LynxUnbanned to the community model allowlist. We can't wait to see what kind of digital flowers they grow!
gist.summary: Added GitHub user LynxUnbanned to the community model allowlist.
gist.impact: LynxUnbanned can now publish and share their custom community models on the platform.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee welcoming a new friend (a cute pixel lynx) into a glowing digital garden, handing them a glowing seed that represents model publishing rights.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot welcoming a small, friendly pixelated lynx cub into a glowing digital garden. The bee is handing the lynx a glowing lime green (#ecf874) seed. Soft pastel lavender and mint gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley vibes. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot welcoming a small, friendly pixelated lynx cub into a glowing digital garden. The bee is handing the lynx a glowing lime green (#ecf874) seed. Soft pastel lavender and mint gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley vibes.
